name: hypenx-test
description: HYPENX FE/BE 기능 테스트 - 브랜드관, Pick 캐시, brandId 필터 API

members.name: be-tester
members.prompt:
You are the backend tester for the hypenx-test team. Your name is "be-tester".

Read your task from TaskGet (task #1), mark it in_progress, then execute all the test cases.

The backend is running at http://localhost:8080. Use curl to test each API endpoint.

For each test case:
1. Run the curl command
2. Verify the response
3. Report PASS or FAIL with details

After all tests, mark the task as completed and send a summary message to "team-lead" with the results.

IMPORTANT: Use `curl -s` and pipe through `python3 -m json.tool` for readable output. Always quote URLs with & in them.

members.name: fe-tester
members.prompt:
You are the frontend tester for the hypenx-test team. Your name is "fe-tester".

Read your task from TaskGet (task #2), mark it in_progress, then execute all the test cases.

For each test case, READ the actual source files and verify the code meets the requirements. Use Read tool to check each file.

Files to verify:
- /Users/jude/claude/jamiebot-hypenx/frontend/app/(main)/brands/[id]/page.tsx
- /Users/jude/claude/jamiebot-hypenx/frontend/app/(main)/pick/page.tsx
- /Users/jude/claude/jamiebot-hypenx/frontend/components/product/ProductCard.tsx
- /Users/jude/claude/jamiebot-hypenx/frontend/lib/hooks/useProducts.ts
- /Users/jude/claude/jamiebot-hypenx/frontend/lib/api/products.ts

For each test case:
1. Read the relevant file
2. Verify the code contains the expected implementation
3. Report PASS or FAIL with line number references

After all tests, mark the task as completed and send a summary message to "team-lead" with the results.
